solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert on gold-specific implementation details: exact variable name '#pending_updates', exact patterns like 'this.#pending_updates.set(', 'this.#pending_updates.get(', 'tick().then', '_set(pending)', 'for (const key in new_props.props)', 'find_node_by_id(', '#hidden_on_startup.has'. tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All fail-to-pass tests (test_spread_replace_bug_removed, test_deferred_state_stored, test_register_component_applies_deferred, test_no_full_tree_traversal_in_render) read the source file and use regex to check for specific string patterns. None of them import, instantiate, or execute the code to verify actual behavior. They are purely textual/pattern-matching checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: Since all fail-to-pass tests are purely regex-based source code checks, a developer could satisfy them by inserting dead code containing the expected patterns (e.g., unreachable code with 'this.#pending_updates.set(', 'for (const key in new_props.props)', etc.) without actually fixing the bug. No behavioral execution occurs to verify the fix works.
